name: Summer Cooler Cake
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup fruit cocktail in syrup, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve gelatin in boiling water.
2. Add cold water to the gelatin mixture.
3. Spread 1 cup of fruit cocktail in the bottom of a 12-cup fluted pan.
4. Pour 1 1/2 cups of gelatin mixture over the fruit cocktail.
5. Brush crumbs off the cake and place the topside down, covering the fruit and gelatin.
6. Press lightly on the top layer.
7. Spoon the remaining fruit cocktail around the side of the cake.
8. Pour the remaining gelatin over the cake.
9. Chill until firm for four hours.
10. Unmold and serve.
